Title: User Login
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.

Title: User Registration
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, password, and name.
3. Click the "Register" button.

Title: Business User Login
Preconditions: Business user has registered an account.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter the valid email and password.
3. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: Business user is successfully logged in.

Title: Business User Registration
Test Data: Valid email, password, name, business information.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Enter the email, password, name, and business information.
3. Click the "Register" button.

Title: Create Post
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post creation page.
2. Enter the title and content.
3. Click the "Create" button.

Title: Delete Post
Preconditions: User is logged in and owns the post.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the post.
2. Click the "Delete" button.

Title: Add User to Neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in and the neighborhood exists.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the neighborhood page.
2. Click the "Add User" button.
3. Select the user to add.
4. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully added to the neighborhood.

Title: Remove User from Neighborhood
Preconditions: User is logged in and the user is in the neighborhood.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the neighborhood page.
2. Click the "Remove User" button next to the user to remove.
3. Confirm the removal.
Expected Result: User is successfully removed from the neighborhood.

2. Click the "Add User" button.

4. Click the "Add" button.
Expected Result: User is successfully added to the chat list.
